auth.label: API Key
auth.description: KIE.AI API key sent as a Bearer token. Create and manage keys in the KIE.AI API key page: https://kie.ai/api-key

actions.name: get_account_credits
actions.description: Get the remaining credit balance for the connected KIE.AI account.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for getting KIE.AI account credits.

code.description: The response status code returned by KIE.AI.

message.description: The response message returned by KIE.AI.

credits.description: The remaining credit quantity reported by KIE.AI.

actions.name: get_download_url
actions.description: Convert a KIE.AI generated file URL into a temporary direct download URL.

url.description: The KIE.AI generated file URL to convert into a download URL.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for getting a KIE.AI download URL.

code.description: The response status code returned by KIE.AI.

message.description: The response message returned by KIE.AI.

downloadUrl.description: The temporary downloadable URL returned by KIE.AI.

expiresInSeconds.description: The documented validity window for the download URL in seconds.

outputSchema.description: The KIE.AI generated file download URL response.
